clues: The Desktop folder suddenly contains many duplicate shortcuts with 'Conflict' in their names.
Files saved to the Desktop appear on the local computer but not on other synced devices.
OneDrive shows an error about 'Known Folder Move' and the backup status is incomplete.
The user recently renamed their computer which changed the device name in OneDrive settings.
The Desktop, Documents, and Pictures folders show 'Not backed up' in OneDrive protection settings.
